title: Decomposition of a Time Series with Deterministic Seasonal Components
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of decomposing a time series into its structural components: Trend, Seasonal, and Irregular (or Residual), with a focus on deterministic seasonal modeling.
relationships: Observed Time Series is decomposed into Trend, Seasonal, and Residual components
The choice between Additive (Y_t = T_t + S_t + I_t) or Multiplicative (Y_t = T_t * S_t * I_t) model dictates the relationships
For deterministic seasonal components, the Seasonal Component (S_t) is modeled using fixed seasonal indices or regression with dummy variables
The Trend Component (T_t) can be estimated separately (e.g., moving average, regression)
The Residual Component (I_t) is what remains after Trend and Seasonality are removed
The estimated components are combined to form the Estimated Model for analysis and forecasting
